fresh_facts.claim: A combined US-Israeli force struck four key Iranian ballistic missile production facilities and 29 other targets on March 29, 2026.
fresh_facts.source: Institute for the Study of War / The Washington Post

fresh_facts.claim: U.S. President Donald Trump announced on March 26, 2026 a 10-day suspension of strikes on Iranian power plants until April 6, 2026 at Iran's request.
fresh_facts.source: Think tank analysis citing government statements

fresh_facts.claim: IDF struck Iranian production sites in Esfahan Province and IRGC Navy facilities in Bushehr on March 24-28, 2026.
fresh_facts.source: Institute for the Study of War

fresh_facts.claim: Iran launched missiles at a Peshmerga base near Erbil on March 24, 2026.
fresh_facts.source: Institute for the Study of War

fresh_facts.claim: Ali Khamenei died prior to March 20, 2026, creating succession uncertainty in Iran's clerical regime.
Mojtaba Khamenei remained incapacitated as of March 20, 2026, based on circumstantial evidence.
Mohammad Bagher Zolghadr was appointed as Supreme National Security Council secretary post-January 2026 to prioritize IRGC control.
Kuwait arrested six Hezbollah-linked individuals on March 26, 2026 for plotting assassinations, signaling regional anti-Iran proxy operations.
fresh_facts.source: Think tank analysis citing regional reports

fresh_facts.claim: Mass killings of protesters occurred during January 2026 protests in Iran, followed by security reinforcements.
Maryam Rajavi's Ten-Point Plan for democratic alternatives in Iran was endorsed on March 15, 2026.
Trump affirmed continued US operations against Iranian targets beyond power plants while casting doubt on peace deals as of March 26, 2026.
The political situation in Iran remained in a 'grinding middle phase' as of late March 2026 with proxy activity ongoing in Lebanon and Iraq.

regime_fall.current_status: US-Israeli forces executed 33 additional strikes on March 29, 2026, including four ballistic missile production facilities, while maintaining operational tempo despite a 10-day suspension on Iranian power plant strikes through April 6. Succession uncertainty following Ali Khamenei's death and potential incapacitation of Mojtaba Khamenei has created a critical power vacuum amid military-dominated decision-making and continued Iranian rejection of ceasefire and recognition terms.
regime_fall.last_major_event: Combined US-Israeli strike on March 29, 2026 destroyed four key Iranian ballistic missile production facilities and 29 other targets, demonstrating sustained operational capacity despite diplomatic pause on power infrastructure.
